_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Meeting Minutes
summary: Meeting minutes document technical information, decisions, and agreements from meetings and conferences for this DID, considering a conference a type of meeting.
use_relationship: Meeting minutes provide documentation of technical information provided, and decisions and agreements reached, at meetings and conferences. For the purposes of this DID, a conference is considered to be a type of meeting.a. This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format, content, and intended use information for the data deliverable resulting from the work task described in the solicitation.b. This DID relates to DI-ADMN-81249, Meeting Agenda. (Copies of this document are available online at https://quicksearch.dla.mil.)c. This DID supersedes DI-ADMN-81250B.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: Contractor format, compatible with government applications, is acceptable.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The meeting minutes shall include the following:

children.title: A title page containing the following:
Meeting title, type of meeting, and meeting date(s).
Identification of the system, equipment, or contract number for which the meeting was held.
Space for signatures of the designated representatives of the contractor and government activity.
The name of the contractor and address to which the government activity will acknowledge receipt of comments.
The purpose and objective of the meeting.
The meeting location (or virtual conferencing application, if applicable).
A summary of the discussions, decisions, and agreements reached during the meeting or during individual subcommittee meetings.
A list of attendees by name, rank, grade or position, activity represented, activity symbol or code, phone number, and email address, as appropriate.
Action items resulting from the meeting, including, for each action item: a description, responsible party, suspense date,closure criteria, and status.
Briefing charts, if any were presented, shall be provided for information only.
A list of documents reviewed during the meeting, where applicable.
Distribution Statement.
children.content: The applicable Distribution Statement, as necessary, in accordance with Department of Defense Instruction (DoDI) 5230.24, Distribution Statements on Technical Documents, Enclosure 4. (Copies of this document are available online at https://www.esd.whs.mil/DD.)

children.title: Classification Marking.
children.content: The applicable classification marking, as necessary, in accordance with Department of Defense Manual (DoDM) 5200.01, Volume 2, DoD Information Security Program: Marking of Information, or Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI) markings (when applicable) in accordance with DoDI 5200.48, Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI). (Copies of these documents are available online at https://www.esd.whs.mil/DD.)
